results.title: Gemini API Quickstart
results.description: A Python Flask app demonstrating the Google AI Gemini API, featuring multi-modal capabilities, a basic UI, and a Flask backend for quick integration.

results.title: Gemini API Veo 3 & Nano Banana Quickstart
results.description: A Next.js quickstart for creating and editing images and videos using Google's Gemini API models, including Veo 3, Imagen 4, and Gemini 2.5 Flash Image (nano banana).

results.title: Clerk TanStack React Start Quickstart
results.description: This quickstart guide demonstrates how to integrate Clerk, a developer-first authentication solution, with TanStack Start applications for user management and authentication.

results.title: AWS Amplify Gen 2 Quickstart
results.description: A quickstart template combining AWS Amplify Gen2 with Next.js, featuring authentication, data modeling, AI chat, storage, and wiki functionality.

results.title: Clerk React Quickstart
results.description: A quickstart guide to integrating Clerk authentication and user management into a React application using Vite.

results.title: Zoom Video SDK Linux GTK Quickstart
results.description: A quickstart guide and demonstration application for building video conferencing applications on Linux using the Zoom Video SDK with GTK, featuring video rendering, audio controls, device management, and real-time messaging.

results.title: PassKit PHP Quickstart
results.description: PHP Quickstart to create, distribute, analyse and manage your Digital Coupons / Membership / Boarding Passes / Event Ticketsfor Apple Wallet and Google Pay

results.title: Gemini Fullstack LangGraph Quickstart
results.description: A fullstack application demonstrating a LangGraph-powered backend agent for comprehensive web research, dynamically generating queries, querying the web, and refining answers with citations using Google Gemini models.

results.title: Gemini 2.0 Image Editing with Next.js
results.description: A Next.js quickstart for generating and editing images using Google Gemini 2.0 Flash, allowing text-to-image creation and natural language-based image modifications with conversational context.

results.title: Casper Network Quickstart
results.description: A quickstart guide for developers to set up the Casper client, deploy a sample smart contract, and interact with it on the Casper Testnet.

results.title: JBoss EAP Quickstarts
results.description: JBoss EAP Quickstarts provides example applications and code to help developers quickly get started with and learn JBoss Enterprise Application Platform.

results.title: Superwise
results.description: A quickstart guide for integrating Machine Learning workflows with the Superwise.ai platform, focusing on model observability in production.

results.title: Firebase Quickstart Samples for Android
results.description: Firebase Quickstart Samples for Android

results.title: Zoom Video SDK Linux Qt Quickstart
results.description: This project is a Qt-based quickstart demo application for the Zoom Video SDK on Linux, providing full video conferencing capabilities with a modern Qt interface, device management, and real-time video/audio.

results.title: Clerk Next.js App Quickstart
results.description: A quickstart guide to integrating Clerk authentication and user management into a Next.js application using the App Router.

results.title: Ultralight Quick Start
results.description: Clone to try a simple Ultralight app.

results.title: Plaid Quickstart
results.description: This repository provides example integration apps using Plaid's client libraries and APIs with a React frontend, showcasing various products and configurations.

results.title: Timefold Quickstarts
results.description: Get started with Timefold quickstarts here. Optimize the vehicle routing problem, employee rostering, task assignment, maintenance scheduling and other planning problems.

results.title: Expo Quickstart App for LiveKit
results.description: A basic Expo quickstart app demonstrating how to get LiveKit up and running on Expo projects, utilizing the Livekit React Native Expo Plugin for setup.

results.title: Ohos Quick Start
results.description: This project provides a quick start guide and resources for developing applications on the OpenHarmony operating system.

results.title: Deepagent Quickstarts
results.description: Deepagent Quickstarts provides a collection of examples demonstrating various agents that can be easily configured using the Deepagents open-source agent harness, which features planning, computer access, and sub-agent delegation.

results.title: Anthropic Quickstarts
results.description: A collection of projects designed to help developers quickly get started building applications using the Anthropic API, featuring examples like customer support agents and financial data analysts.

results.title: React Gantt Quick-Start
results.description: A starter project demonstrating how to integrate DHTMLX Gantt into a React application, providing a foundation for building project management tools.

results.title: Starter
results.description: starter 是一个 Go + gin 框架的项目脚手架,提供开箱即用的工具、库和 gin 项目配置,帮助您快速启动 gin 驱动的 API 项目开发。

results.title: Rasa Pro
results.description: A quickstart guide to using Rasa Pro, a platform for building conversational AI assistants, which can be accessed in-browser without installation.

results.title: Gmail Processor
results.description: Gmail Processor is an open-source Google Apps Script library that automates the processing of Gmail messages and attachments by executing actions like storing files in Google Drive or logging data to spreadsheets, based on powerful matching criteria.

results.title: Algorand dApp Quick Start Guide
results.description: A quick start guide and base template for non-technical founders and developers to rapidly prototype and test Web3 dApps on Algorand, featuring AI-driven UI customization, token/NFT minting, and smart contract interaction.
